post.description:
Super Admin Login

- Validates email and password
- Tracks failed login attempts (max 5)
- Locks account for 1 hour after 5 failed attempts
- Creates session and returns JWT tokens

Super Admin Logout

- Revokes the current session
- Logs the logout activity

Refresh Access Token

- Validates refresh token
- Issues new access token

get.description:
Get Current Super Admin Info

- Returns the currently authenticated super admin's information

post.description:
Request Password Reset

- Generates password reset token
- Stores token in database
- Returns success (doesn't reveal if email exists for security)

get.description:
List all clients with pagination, search, and filters

- Supports search by company name and email
- Filter by plan (free, professional, enterprise)
- Filter by status (active, inactive, suspended)
- Sorting by various fields

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by company name or email
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by company name or email

post.description:
Create a new client

- Validates unique email and company name
- Generates API key
- Creates default settings
- Hashes password

get.description:
Get client details by ID

- Returns full client information
- Includes settings

put.description:
Update client information

- Can update company details
- Can change plan
- Can update contact information

delete.description:
Soft delete a client

- Sets deleted_at timestamp
- Client data is retained for audit purposes

put.description:
Update client status

- Can activate, deactivate, or suspend a client
- Logs all status changes

post.description:
Reset client password (admin action)

- Hashes and sets new password
- Logs the action

get.description:
Get overall platform statistics for dashboard

Returns:
- Total clients (by status and plan)
- Total candidates, requirements, applications
- Recent growth metrics

Get recent activity feed

Returns latest activity logs from all users

Get client growth over time

Returns daily data points showing:
- Total clients
- New clients
- Active clients

Get detailed analytics overview

Returns comprehensive statistics across all entities

post.description:
Client Signup

- Creates new client account with company info
- Generates API key and subdomain
- Creates default settings
- Returns JWT tokens for immediate login

Refresh Access Token for client

Regenerate the API key for the client account.

Create a new requirement (job posting)

- Sets initial status to 'open'

Create a requirement from raw text via AI parsing.
Paste any job description or requirement text and AI extracts structured data.

get.description: Get requirements statistics - counts by status, priority, and overdue.

Assign a candidate to this requirement (exclusive).
A candidate can only be assigned to ONE active requirement at a time.

delete.description: Unassign a candidate from a requirement (soft-delete the applicant record).

put.description:
Move a candidate through the pipeline.
Stages: screening → shortlisted → interview → offered → accepted/rejected

get.description: Get the pipeline view for a requirement — candidates grouped by stage.

Returns all assigned candidates across requirements,
grouped by pipeline stage, with their requirement and tags.
Optional filters: requirement_id, stage.

Filter candidates with comprehensive multi-dimensional filters.
POST endpoint for complex filter payloads.

Get all available filter options dynamically from the database.

For advanced filtering, use POST /filter instead.

Get full candidate profile including application history

Dashboard data for stat cards + role chart.
Matches old app: stats (available, total_reqs, open_reqs, unassigned) + roles distribution.

Candidate additions over time — matches old app's timeline with period toggle.
- days: last 30 days, daily granularity
- months: last 12 months, monthly granularity
- years: all time, yearly granularity
Export all candidates to CSV — matches old app's /api/export/candidates.csv.
